# Container Diagram (C4 Level 2)
<!-- Auto-generated by sentinel scan on 2026-06-22; display-automation node updated by the 2026-06-24 delta re-scan (added com.lucas.unlock-watch). -->

The deployable units are the major configuration subsystems, each a Stow package, coordinated at runtime through Sketchybar and the shell automation layer. A display-automation unit (sleepwatcher for system wake + a compiled unlock-watch helper for screen unlock) and a generated Stream Deck profile sit alongside.

```mermaid
graph TD
  shell["Shell Env<br/>zsh + starship + mise"]
  wm["Window Mgmt<br/>AeroSpace"]
  bar["Status Bar<br/>Sketchybar (items/ + plugins/)"]
  editor["Editor<br/>Neovim / lazy.nvim"]
  term["Terminal<br/>Ghostty + Tmux"]
  auto["Automation<br/>scripts/scripts (Bun/Bash)"]
  disp["Display Automation<br/>com.lucas.sleepwatcher (-w system wake) + com.lucas.unlock-watch (screenIsUnlocked) → bd-wake → display-restore + bd-apply"]
  deck["Stream Deck Profile<br/>streamdeck-build.ts + raycast/ wrappers"]
  shell -->|dispatches| auto
  bar -->|listens to| wm
  bar -->|invokes| auto
  auto -->|drives| wm
  auto -->|owns| disp
  deck -->|raycast:// fires| disp
  term -->|hosts| shell
```
